introSection: Lil' Devil Coaster, previously known as Road Runner Railway, is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride first opened in 1999 as part of the new Looney Tunes Seaport themed area. The theme was based on the Wile E. Coyote and Road Runner Looney Tunes cartoons. It closed with the Looney Tunes Seaport area in 2019, and was dismantled in September. The area was removed to make way for Jersey Devil Coaster.

On July 8, 2021, the park revealed via social media that the roller coaster would return as Lil' Devil Coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a chain lift hill and a single downward helix at its center.

fullText:
Lil' Devil Coaster, previously known as Road Runner Railway, is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

The ride first opened in 1999 as part of the new Looney Tunes Seaport themed area. The theme was based on the Wile E. Coyote and Road Runner Looney Tunes cartoons. It closed with the Looney Tunes Seaport area in 2019, and was dismantled in September. The area was removed to make way for Jersey Devil Coaster.

On July 8, 2021, the park revealed via social media that the roller coaster would return as Lil' Devil Coaster.

The ride has a chain lift hill and a single downward helix at its center.

Blue track and supports.
